modules.title: Today's Weather
modules.summary: Partly cloudy conditions with mostly sunny skies expected. Maximum temperature of 20°C with light winds. Overnight minimum dropping to 8°C with low rainfall risk.

modules.title: Fire Danger & Safety
modules.summary: Open Burning Period (Unrestricted) is currently in effect. No permit is required to light a fire in the open air. Always exercise caution and verify local conditions before ignition.
bullet_points: No permit required for open-air fires today
Always verify local wind and daily weather conditions before ignition
Ensure an adult is present and extinguishing equipment is handy

modules.title: Bin Collection Schedule
modules.summary: This week's collection is Recyclables (Yellow bin). Landfill (Red bin) collection is scheduled for next week.
